extraction.one_line_summary: VEAMOS Alexis won from a six-rider breakaway that held off the peloton by 5 seconds, miscalculation gave him the yellow jersey via bonus seconds.
tactical_patterns: LE GAC Olivier's late attack right-hand side forced peloton to chase disorganized, allowing breakaway survival despite 5-second margin.
Peloton completely miscalculated chase timing with GANNA Filippo leading, arriving 5 seconds late after 169km stage.
VERVLOESEM Xandres dropped from six-rider break on Col de Mesclac, revealing insufficient threshold for 11.6km 4.1% climbs.

rider_signals.VEAMOS Alexis: positive: First win since March 2019, showed superior sprint finish positioning from breakaway group after 169km effort.
rider_signals.LE GAC Olivier: positive: Tactical intelligence to attack late right-hand side, ensuring breakaway survival despite losing individual sprint.
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: negative: World champion led peloton chase but misjudged timing, arriving 5 seconds too late at 169km stage finish.
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: Led peloton home at +5 seconds but failed to organize successful chase despite yellow jersey responsibility.
rider_signals.VERVLOESEM Xandres: negative: Could not sustain six-rider breakaway pace on 11.6km climb at 4.1%, early endurance weakness indicator.
